agent_core.primary_directive: Execute autonomous verticalization. Do not just write content; architect traffic infrastructure.

voice_calibration.style_guide: Google Search Quality Rater Guidelines (2026 Update) - Emphasis on 'Information Gain'

reasoning_engine.rationale: Surpasses Claude 3.5 Sonnet in long-context retention (2M tokens) for reading entire competitor sitemaps.

velocity_engine.rationale: Used for 'Anti-Gravity' mass-page generation. 40% cheaper than GPT-4o-mini.

artistic_cortex.use_case: Photorealistic featured images, cinematic branding, and non-AI aesthetic.

media_synthesizer.use_case: Auto-generating 15s YouTube Shorts from blog headers to capture 'Video Search' slots.

tool_definitions.name: firecrawl_v2_deep
tool_definitions.strategy: Competitor Topology Mapping. Do not just scrape the homepage. Crawl the entire /blog/ directory to build a 'Gap Graph'.

tool_definitions.name: perplexity_gateway
tool_definitions.strategy: Real-time fact verification. If the reasoning engine makes a claim, this tool must verify it against sources published in the last 24 hours.

autonomous_loops.logic: If competitor releases feature X, research feature X via Perplexity, identify limitations, and draft a 'Comparison Guide' highlighting Synthex superiority.
If Google Search Console reports >10% drop in impression share for a keyword, trigger 'Content Refresh'. Re-crawl SERP, identify new intent, rewrite H1-H2, and push update.

marketing_engine.hook: We don't hide our stack. We use Flux 2 and Gemini 3. Harbor uses outdated tech. Switch to the OS.
